content.speakerText: I've already updated the project tracker and briefed Sarah on my tasks.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经更新了项目进度表，并跟莎拉交代了手头工作。

options.text: That's fantastic! You're always so organized.
Why didn't you wait for me to review it first?
Can you just send me the file instead?
I hope you didn't forget the budget report.

content.explanation: 正确答案是对主动准备的积极肯定，符合职场专业语境。干扰项中，第二个质疑对方未等审批，语气不妥；第三个要求直接发文件，忽略了对方已完成沟通；第四个暗示疏漏，与正面反馈语境冲突。

content.speakerText: I'll be available by email for anything critical.
content.speakerTextCn: 如果有紧急事，我随时在线回复邮件。

options.text: Thanks for offering — but please don’t feel pressured to respond outside your time off.
Great, I’ll email you every hour just in case.
Actually, I need you to check emails every day.
Can you also answer calls on weekends?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现关怀与边界意识，符合‘休息优先’的使用说明。干扰项中，第二个过度打扰，第三个违背原意，第四个扩大责任范围，均与鼓励休息的语境冲突。

content.speakerText: I’ve prepared a detailed handover document and scheduled a 30-minute meeting with the team tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 我准备了一份详细的交接文档，并安排了明天与团队30分钟的会议。

options.text: You're going above and beyond — this level of preparation is exactly what we need.
Do you think you're overcomplicating things?
Can you just send the document and skip the meeting?
I didn't ask you to do all this — it's not your responsibility.

content.explanation: 正确答案高度认可主动性和专业性，契合‘减轻经理负担’的场景目标。干扰项中，第二个质疑过度准备，否定积极行为；第三个简化流程，忽略沟通价值；第四个否定责任，语气消极，均不符合职场正向反馈原则。
